query:
-- Fix 1: Delete the stale NCAA-only stub (Oregon away, Maryland home) that was inserted
-- before VSiN scraped the game. The VSiN record (id=1650007, Maryland away, Oregon home)
-- has the correct odds, splits, and publishedToFeed=1. The stub (id=1620073) is the duplicate.
DELETE FROM games WHERE id = 1620073;

-- Fix 2: Ensure the VSiN record has the correct ncaaContestId (it already does: 6593986)
-- and verify it is the only remaining record for this matchup
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, ncaaContestId, sortOrder, publishedToFeed, awayBookSpread
FROM games WHERE ncaaContestId = '6593986';

-- Fix 2: Ensure the VSiN record has the correct ncaaContestId (it already does: 6593986)
